**Tofaş Spor Kulübü** ([Turkish](/wiki/Turkish_language "Turkish language"): *Tofaş Sports Club*), or simply **Tofaş S.K.** or **Tofaş**, and in European competitions as **Tofaş Bursa**, is a professional [basketball](/wiki/Basketball "Basketball") team that is based in [Bursa](/wiki/Bursa "Bursa"), [Turkey](/wiki/Turkey "Turkey"). Their home arena is the [Tofaş Nilüfer Spor Salonu](/wiki/Tofa%C5%9F_Nil%C3%BCfer_Spor_Salonu "Tofaş Nilüfer Spor Salonu"), with a capacity of 7,500 seats. The team is sponsored by Turkish car manufacturer [Tofaş](/wiki/Tofa%C5%9F "Tofaş").

The team competes in the Turkish [Basketbol Süper Ligi](/wiki/Basketbol_S%C3%BCper_Ligi "Basketbol Süper Ligi") (BSL) and the [FIBA Champions League](/wiki/Basketball_Champions_League "Basketball Champions League").

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tofa%C5%9F_S.K.&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/thumb/9/9d/Tofa%C5%9F_SK_logo.png/250px-Tofa%C5%9F_SK_logo.png)](/wiki/File:Tofa%C5%9F_SK_logo.png)

Former logo of the club

Tofaş was founded in 1974. The team won the [BSL](/wiki/Turkish_Basketball_Super_League "Turkish Basketball Super League") in two consecutive seasons, in the 1998–99 and 1999–2000 seasons. The following year, however, the team withdrew from the league, for financial reasons. They returned to competition in the [BSL](/wiki/Turkish_Basketball_Super_League "Turkish Basketball Super League") in the [2003–04](/wiki/2003%E2%80%9304_Turkish_Basketball_League "2003–04 Turkish Basketball League") season, but were [relegated](/wiki/Promotion_and_relegation "Promotion and relegation") to a league level the following year.

Tofaş next played in the [BSL](/wiki/Turkish_Basketball_Super_League "Turkish Basketball Super League"), from the [2009–10](/wiki/2009%E2%80%9310_Turkish_Basketball_League "2009–10 Turkish Basketball League") season, to the [2014–15](/wiki/2014%E2%80%9315_Turkish_Basketball_League "2014–15 Turkish Basketball League") season. In addition to the club's two [Turkish Super League](/wiki/Turkish_Basketball_Super_League "Turkish Basketball Super League") titles (1999, 2000), the team has also won three [Turkish Cups](/wiki/Turkish_Cup_Basketball "Turkish Cup Basketball") (1993, 1999, 2000), and a [Turkish President's Cup](/wiki/Turkish_Basketball_President%27s_Cup "Turkish Basketball President's Cup") (1999). In the club's heyday, the team achieved significant success at the European-wide continental level. Such as being the runner-up in the European-wide third-tier level [FIBA Korać Cup](/wiki/FIBA_Kora%C4%87_Cup "FIBA Korać Cup")'s [1996–97 season](/wiki/1996%E2%80%9397_FIBA_Kora%C4%87_Cup "1996–97 FIBA Korać Cup") Final against the Greek club [Aris Thessaloniki](/wiki/Aris_B.C. "Aris B.C.").

Tofaş also competed in the [European-wide top-tier level](/wiki/European_professional_club_basketball_system "European professional club basketball system") [EuroLeague](/wiki/EuroLeague "EuroLeague"), in the [1999–2000 season](/wiki/1999%E2%80%932000_FIBA_EuroLeague "1999–2000 FIBA EuroLeague").

In 2015, Tofaş was relegated from the BSL to the First League. The club was immediately promoted back as it was the 2016 TBL champion. The club played in the European-wide second-tier level [EuroCup](/wiki/EuroCup_Basketball "EuroCup Basketball"), in the [2017–18 season](/wiki/2017%E2%80%9318_EuroCup_Basketball "2017–18 EuroCup Basketball").[[1]](#cite_note-1) The same season, Tofaş reached the [2018](/wiki/2017%E2%80%9318_Basketbol_S%C3%BCper_Ligi "2017–18 Basketbol Süper Ligi") finals of the BSL. Despite winning game 3 at home,[[2]](#cite_note-2) the team fell to [Fenerbahçe](/wiki/Fenerbah%C3%A7e_Men%27s_Basketball "Fenerbahçe Men's Basketball") and lost the series 4–1.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

## Arenas

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tofa%C5%9F_S.K.&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Arenas")]

Tofaş S.K. used the 3,500-seat capacity [Bursa Atatürk Sport Hall](/wiki/Bursa_Atat%C3%BCrk_Sport_Hall "Bursa Atatürk Sport Hall"), as its home arena for many years. The club then moved into the 7,500-seat capacity [Tofaş Nilüfer Spor Salonu](/wiki/Tofa%C5%9F_Nil%C3%BCfer_Spor_Salonu "Tofaş Nilüfer Spor Salonu").[[4]](#cite_note-4)[[5]](#cite_note-5)
